proposition: Václav Faraga holds statutory and/or ownership roles in at least five other companies beyond Able.cz — Mindee app s.r.o. (IČO 06437877), Blackfish & Co. s.r.o. (IČO 06526411), ERA25 s.r.o. (IČO 23630051, 39.5%), Verzuz.com s.r.o. (IČO 24094323), and FaMe logistics s.r.o. v likvidaci (IČO 02019396) — most tied to a shared Znojmo address cluster.
